conflict: state health department survey forces maximum impairment performance while Carmen must explain medication discrepancies under her name
consequence: Carmen actively lies to a government official to protect the ring; she is legally complicit and cannot return to innocent bystander
must_land_beats: Cliff's administrative panic — fresh flowers, redone documentation, motivational poster
Harry's Oscar-caliber confused-old-man performance with elaborate, internally consistent wrong answers
Agnes pretending she doesn't know what a pill is
Lola charming the surveyor with a twenty-minute fabricated story
Earl falling asleep mid-interview; Burt not having to pretend much
Carmen's interview: the surveyor notes count discrepancies, Carmen lies fluently
Aftermath: Carmen alone in her car, unable to drive for fifteen minutes

payoffs_to_land.description: The count discrepancies documented under Carmen's name become the specific thing she must explain to the state surveyor, forcing her to lie

pressure_source: state health department survey forces maximum impairment performance while Carmen must explain medication discrepancies under her name
secondary_character_beats: Cliff's panic reveals his priorities — census numbers and survey scores, not patient welfare
The surveyor is competent but overwhelmed — too many facilities, too little time
state_shift: Carmen actively lies to a government official to protect the ring; she is legally complicit and cannot return to innocent bystander
